reason_detail: Buyer said per-seat pricing didn't scale for their headcount growth
Competitor lacked native SSO required for their security policy
Buyer had a prior bad support experience with Competitor B
Needed audit logging not available in competitor's base tier
Buyer wanted an all-in-one suite, not modular add-ons
Flat pricing model was easier to budget for than competitor's tiers
Competitor's compliance certifications were stronger for this region
